# SEO Score
> A professional suite of AI-powered SEO tools for technical audits, keyword research, and content optimization.

## Summary
SEO Score provides more than 20 free search optimization tools driven by Google Gemini AI. The platform helps webmasters, marketers, and developers improve their search rankings through data-driven analysis and technical precision.

## Core Tools
- [Website SEO Audit](https://seoscore.site/tools/free-website-seo-audit-tool)
- [Keyword Research](https://seoscore.site/tools/free-keyword-research-tool)
- [On-Page SEO Optimizer](https://seoscore.site/tools/free-on-page-seo-optimizer)
- [Backlink Checker](https://seoscore.site/tools/free-backlink-checker-tool)
- [Site Speed Test](https://seoscore.site/tools/free-website-speed-test-tool)
- [AI Content Generator](https://seoscore.site/tools/free-ai-content-generator-tool)

## Resources
- [Latest SEO Blog Insights](https://seoscore.site/blog)
- [Frequently Asked Questions](https://seoscore.site/faq)

## Technical Architecture
- Framework: React 18+ with Vite
- Styling: Tailwind CSS
- AI: Google Gemini 3.1 (Pro/Flash)
- Accessibility: Mobile-first responsive design
